name: qsp-skills
description: Skills and plugins by QSP GmbH

plugins.name: plusui
plugins.description: PlusUi cross-platform .NET UI framework reference. Code-first fluent C# UI (NOT XAML/MAUI/WPF) — ensures correct controls, layouts, Set*/Bind* binding, theming, navigation, and continuous pointer/drag-to-resize.

plugins.name: sproutdb
plugins.description: SproutDB query language and C# integration reference. Ensures correct syntax (NOT SQL).

plugins.name: catena
plugins.description: Catena patch-based version control reference. Ensures correct `catena` CLI usage and the right mental model (NOT Git).
